issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect prevents opponent from activating Blockers (a restriction/denial effect), not resting cards. Should use a condition-based prevention mechanic or custom action that represents 'cannot activate as Blocker'. Current DSL does not match the card text which states 'Your opponent cannot activate a [Blocker] Character'.

Missing duration constraint. Effect text '[When Attacking]' indicates this applies 'during this battle' only, which should be reflected as duration:'DuringThisBattle' or similar temporary scope, not permanent board state change.
Target scope is incomplete. Should specify 'BlockerCharacter' or 'CharacterWithBlockerKeyword' to match 'Blocker Character' in text, not just any character with power ≤2000.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] Your opponent cannot activate a [Blocker] Character that has 2000 or less power during this battle.
